mapper.sql: SELECT PROOF_NO , USER_ID , JOIN_NO , TITLE , CATEGORY , QUANTITY , CONTENT , CREATE_DATE FROM PROOF_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROOF_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
AND CATEGORY = #{category}
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATE_DATE) AS YEAR, SUM(QUANTITY) AS TREE_COUNT FROM PROOF_BOARD WHERE CATEGORY = 'PLANT' AND DELETED = 'N' GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATE_DATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROOF_BOARD WHERE JOIN_NO = #{joinNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
